interface.longDescription:
Reimagine your sales workflow with Salesforce and ChatGPT. Get CRM context on every deal directly in ChatGPT, so reps can research, plan, and close faster. Then, enrich Salesforce with the key insights so you and your team can make smarter decisions.

From pipeline updates to account research, it gives you the clarity, speed, and guidance you need to close more deals with confidence.
